description: NTS M365 Guard additional rules - merge with base (CyberDrain/Check). Host this file and set Additional Rules URL in Options.

phishing_indicators.pattern: (?:copy the code(?:\s+above)?|click continue and paste(?:\s*\(ctrl\+v\))?|sign in with your microsoft account)
phishing_indicators.description: Microsoft device code login instructions on non-Microsoft domain
